testcase.name: Middleware > skips public routes
Middleware > skips static files
Middleware > redirects unauthenticated users to login
Middleware > allows authenticated users to access protected routes
Middleware > allows unauthenticated users to access login page
Middleware > redirects authenticated users away from login to dashboard
Middleware > applies rate limiting to /auth/callback
Middleware > allows /auth/signout without authentication (publicRoute)
utils > cn > merges class names correctly
utils > cn > handles conditional classes
utils > cn > merges tailwind classes using tailwind-merge
utils > cn > handles arrays and objects
AuthProvider > renders loading state initially
AuthProvider > updates state when session is found
AuthProvider > updates state when auth state changes
TodayTasksWidget > renders loading state initially
TodayTasksWidget > renders empty state when no tasks
TodayTasksWidget > renders tasks due today
testcase.system-err:
Received `true` for a non-boolean attribute `layout`.
If you want to write it to the DOM, pass a string instead: layout="true" or layout={value.toString()}. React does not recognize the `dragDirectionLock` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `dragdirectionlock` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element. React does not recognize the `dragConstraints` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `dragconstraints` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element. React does not recognize the `dragElastic` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `dragelastic` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element. React does not recognize the `whileHover` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `whilehover` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element.

testcase.name: RoutineModal > renders correctly when creating a new routine
testcase.system-err: React does not recognize the `whileHover` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `whilehover` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element. React does not recognize the `whileTap` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `whiletap` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element.

testcase.name: RoutineModal > renders correctly when editing a routine
RoutineModal > calls onClose when Cancel is clicked
calculations > formatDate > formats Date and string inputs correctly
calculations > calculateCurrentStreak > returns 0 for no completions
calculations > calculateCurrentStreak > returns correct count for consecutive days
calculations > calculateCurrentStreak > gap breaks streak
calculations > calculateCurrentStreak > streak remains active if yesterday was completed but not today
calculations > calculateCurrentStreak > returns 0 if last completion was before yesterday
calculations > calculateBestStreak > finds longest run
calculations > calculateCompletionRate > returns 0 for 0 totalDays
calculations > calculateCompletionRate > calculates correct percentage
calculations > calculateMomentum > returns UP when last 7 days better than previous 7
calculations > calculateMomentum > returns DOWN when last 7 days worse than previous 7
calculations > calculateMomentum > returns STABLE when equal
calculations > getDeadlineStatus > returns overdue status
calculations > getDeadlineStatus > returns due today status
calculations > getDeadlineStatus > returns due tomorrow status
calculations > getDeadlineStatus > returns upcoming status
calculations > calculateCategoryBreakdown > filters by category and calculates percentages
rateLimit (in-memory backend) > allows first request and returns correct remaining count
rateLimit (in-memory backend) > tracks request count correctly
rateLimit (in-memory backend) > blocks when limit is exceeded
rateLimit (in-memory backend) > resets correctly after the time window expires
rateLimit (in-memory backend) > keys independently by IP and path
rateLimit (in-memory backend) > prefers leftmost IP from x-forwarded-for
rateLimitResponse > returns 429 status
rateLimitResponse > returns JSON content-type
rateLimitResponse > sets Retry-After header correctly
rateLimitResponse > returns body with error and retryAfter fields
url-validator > isValidOrigin > accepts allowed hosts
url-validator > isValidOrigin > accepts allowed subdomains
url-validator > isValidOrigin > rejects unknown domains
url-validator > isValidOrigin > blocks non-http protocols
url-validator > isValidOrigin > handles totally invalid URLs safely
url-validator > isValidPath > accepts allowed exact paths
url-validator > isValidPath > accepts allowed subdirectories
url-validator > isValidPath > rejects protocol-relative // URLs
url-validator > isValidPath > rejects paths not starting with /
url-validator > isValidPath > rejects unlisted paths
url-validator > validateRedirectUrl > returns validated URL when both origin and path are valid
url-validator > validateRedirectUrl > falls back when origin is invalid
testcase.system-err: Invalid origin detected: https://evil.com, using fallback

testcase.name: url-validator > validateRedirectUrl > falls back when path is invalid
url-validator > getValidatedNextPath > extracts valid next param
url-validator > getValidatedNextPath > returns fallback for missing param
url-validator > getValidatedNextPath > returns fallback for invalid param
useAchievementStore > should calculate initial achievements as locked
useAchievementStore > should unlock Discipline Starter when progress is achieved
useAchievementStore > should unlock streak achievements correctly
useAchievementStore > should allow claiming rewards and updating gamification store
gamification-store > Initial state has xp=0, level=1, gems=0
gamification-store > addXp increments XP correctly
gamification-store > addXp triggers level-up at threshold and awards gems
gamification-store > addXp carries over excess XP after level-up
gamification-store > spendGems deducts correctly
gamification-store > spendGems fails if insufficient gems
gamification-store > buyShield costs SHIELD_COST gems and increments shields
gamification-store > buyShield fails if insufficient gems
gamification-store > getBufferProgress returns 0-100 range
gamification-store > useShield decrements streakShield and returns true if shields > 0
gamification-store > useShield returns false and does not decrement if shields is 0
gamification-store > negative XP reverts stats and XP correctly
goal-store > Initial state is empty
goal-store > addGoal creates goal and milestones
goal-store > editGoal updates goal
goal-store > removeGoal removes goal and associated milestones
goal-store > setFocus handles limits
goal-store > getFilteredGoals filters correctly
goal-store > toggleMilestoneComplete updates state
HabitStore > should have initial state
HabitStore > should calculate today progress correctly
HabitStore > should filter archived habits from progress
HabitStore > loadArchivedHabits should call getArchivedHabits and return archived habits
HabitStore > freezeHabit should unfreeze if already frozen
HabitStore > freezeHabit should allow free weekly freeze if no other freezes in the same week
HabitStore > freezeHabit should consume shield if another freeze exists in the same week and shield use succeeds
HabitStore > freezeHabit should throw error if another freeze exists in the same week and shield use fails
MoodStore > should have initial state
MoodStore > should load mood logs correctly
MoodStore > should log mood and trigger sync
MoodStore > should get mood for a specific date
PomodoroStore > should have initial state
PomodoroStore > should start timer and set task status to in_progress
PomodoroStore > should pause and resume timer
PomodoroStore > should handle timer ticks and complete session
PomodoroStore > should reset timer to mode default duration
PomodoroStore > should adjust duration when not running
PomodoroStore > should not adjust duration when running
task-store > Initial state is empty
task-store > addTask creates task and syncs
task-store > editTask updates task
task-store > removeTask removes task
task-store > toggleTaskComplete toggles status and awards XP
task-store > getActiveTasks and getCompletedTasks filter correctly
task-store > getTasksByDate filters by due_date
ResetPasswordPage — session guard > shows a spinner while session is being determined
ResetPasswordPage — session guard > shows the reset form when PASSWORD_RECOVERY event fires
ResetPasswordPage — session guard > redirects to /login when a normal SIGNED_IN event fires (non-recovery user blocked)
ResetPasswordPage — session guard > 5-second timeout fallback > redirects to /login after timeout if no session exists
ResetPasswordPage — session guard > 5-second timeout fallback > shows form after timeout if a session exists (event fired before subscription)
ResetPasswordPage — session guard > 5-second timeout fallback > redirects to /login after timeout if getSession returns an error
ResetPasswordPage — form validation > shows password requirements checklist when the user starts typing
ResetPasswordPage — form validation > prevents submit when passwords do not match
ResetPasswordPage — form validation > prevents submit when password does not meet requirements
ResetPasswordPage — form validation > calls updateUser and redirects to /dashboard on successful password reset
ResetPasswordPage — form validation > shows an error toast when updateUser fails
ResetPasswordPage — form validation > toggles password visibility when the eye button is clicked
Auth Callback Route > redirects to error page when no code is provided
testcase.system-out: Callback received: { code: false, error: null, next: '/dashboard', type: null }

testcase.name: Auth Callback Route > redirects to error page when provider returns error
testcase.system-out: Callback received: { code: false, error: 'access_denied', next: '/dashboard', type: null }

testcase.name: Auth Callback Route > exchanges code for session and redirects to dashboard
testcase.system-out: Callback received: { code: true, error: null, next: '/dashboard', type: null } Session exchange successful, user: test@example.com

testcase.name: Auth Callback Route > redirects to reset-password when type is recovery
testcase.system-out: Callback received: { code: true, error: null, next: '/dashboard', type: 'recovery' } Session exchange successful, user: test@example.com

testcase.name: Auth Callback Route > handles exchange errors gracefully
testcase.system-out: Callback received: { code: true, error: null, next: '/dashboard', type: null }

testcase.name: Auth Callback Route > uses x-forwarded headers for origin if present
testcase.system-out: Callback received: { code: true, error: null, next: '/dashboard', type: null } Session exchange successful, user: test@example.com

testcase.name: Auth Signout Route > signs out and redirects to login
Auth Signout Route > uses x-forwarded headers for origin
